claim: AI coding agents can validate and fix their own work more effectively than developers doing manual testing when given proper validation prompts
actionable: Create a comprehensive validation.md prompt that teaches agents to test end-to-end (not just linting/unit tests) and run it after each implementation
source_title: AI Fixes My Code Better than Me Now?! (Here's How)

claim: End-to-end validation (testing actual user flows, not just unit tests) is underutilized in AI coding workflows but catches real bugs developers miss
actionable: Design validation to test actual usage scenarios (user flows, integrations) not just code quality metrics like linting and type checking
source_title: AI Fixes My Code Better than Me Now?! (Here's How)

claim: Agents can simulate user behavior and test tools (like GitHub CLI) automatically to validate integration without manual testing
actionable: Teach agents to use CLI tools and APIs to create test repositories, issues, and PRs to fully validate your application's integrations
source_title: AI Fixes My Code Better than Me Now?! (Here's How)

claim: Validation is cheaper (in tokens/compute) to run than manual testing while being comprehensive, so the PIV loop (Plan-Implement-Validate) saves time overall
actionable: Measure actual time savings of automated validation against manual testing in your workflow and optimize token usage in validation
source_title: AI Fixes My Code Better than Me Now?! (Here's How)
